overall.description: Cinematic exploration of Hogwarts castle from the game Hogwarts Legacy, beginning with aerial drone shots circling the Great Hall and Viaduct Courtyard, then transitioning to ground level to walk along the stone viaduct and through a covered gothic cloister where students in wizard robes are visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view of castle courtyard and great hall

events.description: transition from aerial drone view to ground level perspective on the viaduct

agents.ego_description: flying around the castle in a smooth drone-like perspective, circling the Great Hall building and viaduct courtyard

entered.detail: large gothic stone building with tall spires and stained glass windows
cluster of pointed stone towers and spires rising behind the main hall
lower courtyard area with grass and stone pathways connecting to the viaduct bridge
dense green forest surrounding the castle grounds

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with an aerial drone view circling the Great Hall of Hogwarts castle. The Gothic stone architecture dominates the frame with its tall spires and detailed facades, while the surrounding forest and viaduct courtyard are visible below. No pedestrians are visible from this height.

events.description: camera transitions from aerial to ground level walking perspective along the viaduct
approaching and entering the covered archway entrance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone viaduct bridge toward the arched gatehouse entrance

entered.detail: large Gothic arched entrance with pointed spires and stone carvings
elevated stone bridge with cobblestone surface and crenellated walls
black iron fence railings along the sides of the viaduct
tall evergreen tree growing beside the viaduct approach

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to ground level as the camera walks along the stone viaduct bridge toward a Gothic gatehouse arch. Iron railings line the walkway, and a tall pine tree stands to the right. The Great Hall building is now visible in the distance to the left as the camera approaches the covered entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered gothic cloister walkway with courtyard views

events.description: entering the covered cloister, lighting becomes diffused through the gothic arches
student in robes walks past the camera from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered cloister corridor, observing the courtyard and students through the gothic arches

notable_agents.action: student in black wizard robes walking past the camera from right to left in the corridor

entered.detail: series of ornate Gothic arches with pointed tops and stone tracery forming the corridor walls
weathered stone tile flooring with moss in the joints
decorative iron lantern holders mounted on the stone columns
large wooden doors of the Great Hall visible through the arches across the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered Gothic cloister with diffused sunlight streaming through arched windows. The stone corridor features ornate columns and wall sconces, with views through the arches to the courtyard where students in wizard robes gather. A student walks past the camera in the corridor, and the Great Hall entrance is visible in the distance through the archways.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a sweeping aerial view of the castle's spires into the intimate, shadowed corridors of a Gothic cloister. It begins by circling the Great Hall from a high drone perspective, capturing the detailed stone facades and the sprawling forest and viaduct courtyard below. As the perspective shifts to ground level, the camera glides along the stone viaduct bridge past iron railings and a tall pine tree, moving steadily toward a gatehouse arch. The scene then transitions into a covered cloister where diffused sunlight streams through arched windows and ornate columns. Finally, the camera moves through the stone corridor as students in wizard robes gather in the adjacent courtyard and one walks past, with the Great Hall remaining visible in the distance through the archways.
